description: Los Ciclones, also known as the Facción Matamoros, is a Mexican criminal organization and one of the four main factions of the Gulf Cartel. Based in Matamoros, Tamaulipas, it was founded between 2010 and 2012 by Rafael Cárdenas Vélez. The group is engaged in drug trafficking, murder, kidnapping, extortion, and money laundering, and operates primarily in northeastern Mexico and the border area with Brownsville, Texas. It is currently active and in conflict with rival cartels such as the Cartel del Noreste and Los Metros.

country_links.evidence_quote: Los Ciclones-Escorpiones tienen como su área de influencia el cruce fronterizo entre Matamoros , Río Bravo , Valle Hermoso y Brownsville , Estados Unidos .
country_links.context: Los Ciclones-Escorpiones have their area of influence including the border crossing between Matamoros and Brownsville, and have expanded drug trafficking distribution to cities like Atlanta, Detroit, and Houston.
